ExternalServiceRegistration.description: Leverages Salesforce sObject Collection API to create Leads in bulk.
ExternalServiceRegistration.label: MinloproLeadsApiBulk
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: {"openapi":"3.0.1","info":{"title":"MinloproLeadsApiBulk","description":"Leverages Salesforce sObject Collection API to create Leads in bulk."},"paths":{"/services/data/v63.0/composite/sobjects":{"post":{"description":"Bulk creates Lead records within a single HTTP callout.","operationId":"Create Leads","requestBody":{"description":"Create Leads","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"allOrNone":{"type":"boolean"},"records":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"Email":{"type":"string"},"LeadSource":{"type":"string"},"FirstName":{"type":"string"},"Phone":{"type":"string"},"Title":{"type":"string"},"attributes":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string"}}},"LastName":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}},"required":true},"responses":{"2XX":{"description":"Success Response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"success":{"type":"boolean"},"id":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}}}}}}
